meaning: Department of Employment and Productivity (英国)就业和生产率部
examples: Make dep need not be run at any stage.
On Ubuntu and Debian, simply type sudo apt-get build-dep gimp.
For Network Dep. server name, enter your cell name plus your node name plus your server name.
That missing safeguard matters: All Apple products use Data Execution Prevention, or DEP, a feature that prevents malicious code from running its own commands.
Since 2008, the iPhone has employed DEP to make sure that no new commands can be injected into applications in the guise of data.
